User Story: As a student, I want to login via my secure university ID so I can access my profile.
Acceptance Criteria: Login form accepts standard university ID format; Invalid credentials throw an error message.

User Story: As a teacher, I want to see a real-time updating list of who is present right now in my class.
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard refreshes automatically; Students appear on the list the moment their app triggers attendance.

User Story: As the system, I want to securely detect if a student is within a 10m radius of the classroom using GPS geofencing.
Acceptance Criteria: System actively polls GPS coordinates; Attendance is automatically marked 'Present' when within 10m of the registered room coordinates.

User Story: As a student, I want my phone to push a notification to me when my attendance gets successfully marked.
Acceptance Criteria: Trigger local push notification 'Attendance marked for [Class Name]'; Notification is received within 5 seconds of geofence entry.

User Story: As an admin, I want to be able to manually override attendance records in case a student's phone battery dies or there is a technical error.
Acceptance Criteria: Admin dashboard shows 'Edit' button next to student names; Admin can toggle student state from Absent to Present with an audit trail note.
